title: KitchenPerfected 1000w 0.9Ltr Corded Lightweight Travel Kettle with 2 cups - Cream - E1201WI
features: COMPACT & LIGHTWEIGHT: This compact kettle is the ideal size for travel and can be added to your suitcase without taking up too much room. Take with you on holiday to make your favourite cuppa, for a taste of home, wherever you may be.
DUAL VOLTAGE: Thanks to dual voltage control the kettle can be used in all countries. With the free travel case and cups provided you'll be fully prepared for all destinations!
BOIL DRY PROTECTION: The kettle is fitted with an automatic cut off device which will detect if there is no water or not enough water present preventing the kettle from boiling dry.

FREE MUGS & TRAVEL CASE: Included you will find a convenient travel case to keep your kettle in on your journey. You can also use this as a storage bag in-between trips to keep your kettle clean. The cups included are made from a durable plastic to prevent breakages.

SPECIFICATIONS: This 1000w KitchenPerfected Travel kettle has a maximum capacity of 0.9 litres with special features including a hinged lid, stainless steel heating element, automatic safety shut off, universal voltage and LED power indicator light. The kettle is supplied in a gift box with two free cups, a travel case and an instruction manual.
description: From the manufacturer Product Specifications Product Size L x W x H (cm): 20.0 x 8.5 x 17.0 Gift Box Size L x W x H (cm): 21.5 x 9.5 x 17.5 Carton Size L x W x H (cm): 54.0 x 21.0 x 44.5 Carton Weight (kg) 6.0 Carton Quantity: 12 Inner Quantity: n/a STD Pallet Height (Mtr): 1.49 STD Pallet Quantity: 324 Brand: Kitchen Perfected Colour Beige Lloytron E886 Travel Kettle With Cups Description Universal voltage Includes 2 plastic mugs Boil dry protection Automatic switch off Stainless steel element Power indicator light Power: 1000w Maximum capacity: 0.9ltr Colour: beige Packaging: gift box
